attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
ST.NOTIFY_SEQ, 
ST.ORDNO, 
ST.ORDER_NUMBER, 
ST.ORDER_GROUP, 
ST.ITEM_NAME, 
ST.REC_TYPE, 
ST.SLC_CTRY, 
ST.SHIP_TO_CTRY, 
ST.SLC_OVR_CTRY, 
ST.SHIP_TO_OVR_CTRY, 
ST.SHIPSET, 
ST.MISSING_PART_FLG, 
ST.MISSING_SLC_HTS_FLG, 
ST.MISSING_SHIP_TO_HTS_FLG, 
ST.CREATION_DATE, 
ST.IMPORTED_FLAG, 
ST.CLASSIFIED_FLAG, 
ST.IGNORE_FLAG, 
ST.WORK_BENCH_ID, 
ST.SHIP_TO_OVR_CTY_GRP, 
ST.SLC_OVR_CTY_GRP, 
ST.CREATED_BY, 
ST.FCD_DATE, 
ST.OCC_CTRY, 
ST.OCC_OVR_CTY_GRP, 
ST.MISSING_OCC_HTS_FLG, 
ST.SUPERBOM, 
ST.WORKBENCH_FLAG, 
ST.REASON, 
ST.REMOVED_DATE, 
ST.CREATE_DATETIME, 
ST.ACTION_CODE 
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_XXCFI_CB_ITEM_EXCEPTIONS ST
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SEL 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC1
 ON ST.SLC_CTRY=NIC1.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC2
 ON ST.SHIP_TO_CTRY=NIC2.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC3
 ON ST.SLC_OVR_CTRY=NIC3.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC4
 ON ST.SHIP_TO_OVR_CTRY=NIC4.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP NWCG1
 ON ST.SHIP_TO_OVR_CTY_GRP=NWCG1.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP NWCG2
 ON ST.SLC_OVR_CTY_GRP=NWCG2.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD 
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC5
 ON ST.OCC_CTRY=NIC5.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP NWCG3
 ON ST.OCC_OVR_CTY_GRP=NWCG3.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD
 WHERE  ST.ITEM_NAME=NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID)

SELECT 
B.CUBE_ITEM_EXCEPTION_KEY,
B.RECORD_TYPE_CD, 
B.MISSING_PRODUCT_FLG, 
B.MISSING_SHIP_TO_HTS_FLG, 
B.MSNG_SRC_LOC_OVERRIDE_HTS_FLG, 
B.IMPORTED_ITEM_FLG, 
B.SOURCE_CREATION_DTM, 
B.IGNORE_ORDER_FLG, 
B.SALES_ORDER_GROUP_CD, 
B.ITEM_CLASSIFIED_FLG, 
B.REASON_CMNT, 
B.REMOVED_DT, 
B.BK_SHIPSET_NUM_INT, 
B.BK_SRC_LOC_ISO_COUNTRY_CD, 
B.BK_SHIP_TO_ISO_COUNTRY_CD, 
B.BK_SRCLOC_OVERRIDE_ISOCNTRY_CD, 
B.BK_SHP_TO_OVERRIDE_ISOCNTRY_CD, 
B.BK_SHP_TO_OVERRIDE_WRLD_CG_CD, 
B.BK_SRC_LOC_OVERRIDE_WRLD_CG_CD, 
B.BK_OCC_INTERFACE_ISO_CNTRY_CD, 
B.BK_OCC_INTERFACE_OVRDE_CG_CD, 
B.SK_NOTIFY_SEQ_INT, 
B.SS_CD, 
B.RU_SHIPMENT_DT, 
B.RU_LAST_UPDATED_DT, 
B.RU_SCHEDULED_ARRIVAL_DT, 
B.RU_ORDER_STATUS_CD, 
B.RU_ROUTE_CD, 
B.RU_IMPORT_STATUS_FLG, 
B.RU_ORDER_HOLD_FLG, 
B.RU_IMPORTER_OF_RECORD_NAME, 
B.RU_MISSING_SHIP_FROM_HTS_FLG, 
B.RU_CG1_BUSINESS_GROUP_CD, 
B.RU_BK_SHPFRM_OVRDE_WRLD_CG_CD, 
B.RU_BK_SHPFRM_OVRDE_ISOCNTRY_CD, 
B.RU_BK_SHIP_FROM_ISO_COUNTRY_CD, 
B.RU_BK_INTRFC_OVRDE_ISOCNTRY_CD, 
B.PRODUCT_KEY, 
B.CG1_TYPE, 
B.RU_SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
B.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
B.RU_SRC_RPTD_SO_NUM, 
B.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
B.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
B.EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
B.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
B.MISSING_OCC_CG_HTS_FLG, 
B.RU_SRC_RPTD_SHIPSET_NUM_INT ,
B.ACTION_CODE,
B.DML_TYPE 
FROM(
SELECT
SCIE.CUBE_ITEM_EXCEPTION_KEY, 
WIC.RECORD_TYPE_CD, 
WIC.MISSING_PRODUCT_FLG, 
WIC.MISSING_SHIP_TO_HTS_FLG, 
WIC.MSNG_SRC_LOC_OVERRIDE_HTS_FLG, 
WIC.IMPORTED_ITEM_FLG, 
WIC.SOURCE_CREATION_DTM, 
WIC.IGNORE_ORDER_FLG, 
WIC.SALES_ORDER_GROUP_CD, 
WIC.ITEM_CLASSIFIED_FLG, 
WIC.REASON_CMNT, 
WIC.REMOVED_DT, 
WIC.BK_SHIPSET_NUM_INT, 
WIC.BK_SRC_LOC_ISO_COUNTRY_CD, 
WIC.BK_SHIP_TO_ISO_COUNTRY_CD, 
WIC.BK_SRCLOC_OVERRIDE_ISOCNTRY_CD, 
WIC.BK_SHP_TO_OVERRIDE_ISOCNTRY_CD, 
WIC.BK_SHP_TO_OVERRIDE_WRLD_CG_CD, 
WIC.BK_SRC_LOC_OVERRIDE_WRLD_CG_CD, 
WIC.BK_OCC_INTERFACE_ISO_CNTRY_CD, 
WIC.BK_OCC_INTERFACE_OVRDE_CG_CD, 
SCIE.SK_NOTIFY_SEQ_INT, 
SCIE.SS_CD, 
WIC.RU_SHIPMENT_DT, 
WIC.RU_LAST_UPDATED_DT, 
WIC.RU_SCHEDULED_ARRIVAL_DT, 
WIC.RU_ORDER_STATUS_CD, 
WIC.RU_ROUTE_CD, 
WIC.RU_IMPORT_STATUS_FLG, 
WIC.RU_ORDER_HOLD_FLG, 
WIC.RU_IMPORTER_OF_RECORD_NAME, 
WIC.RU_MISSING_SHIP_FROM_HTS_FLG, 
WIC.RU_CG1_BUSINESS_GROUP_CD, 
WIC.RU_BK_SHPFRM_OVRDE_WRLD_CG_CD, 
WIC.RU_BK_SHPFRM_OVRDE_ISOCNTRY_CD, 
WIC.RU_BK_SHIP_FROM_ISO_COUNTRY_CD, 
WIC.RU_BK_INTRFC_OVRDE_ISOCNTRY_CD, 
WIC.PRODUCT_KEY, 
WIC.CG1_TYPE, 
WIC.RU_SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
WIC.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
WIC.RU_SRC_RPTD_SO_NUM, 
WIC.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
WIC.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
WIC.EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
WIC.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
WIC.MISSING_OCC_CG_HTS_FLG, 
WIC.RU_SRC_RPTD_SHIPSET_NUM_INT ,
WIC.ACTION_CODE,
WIC.DML_TYPE
FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_CUBE_ITEM_EXCEPTION WIC
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_CUBE_ITEM_EXCEPTION SCIE
 ON (WIC.SK_NOTIFY_SEQ_INT=SCIE.SK_NOTIFY_SEQ_INT
 AND WIC.SS_CD=SCIE.SS_CD)
  UNION ALL
 SELECT 
SCIE.CUBE_ITEM_EXCEPTION_KEY,
WICG.RECORD_TYPE_CD, 
WICG.MISSING_PRODUCT_FLG, 
WICG.MISSING_SHIP_TO_HTS_FLG, 
WICG.MSNG_SRC_LOC_OVERRIDE_HTS_FLG, 
WICG.IMPORTED_ITEM_FLG, 
WICG.SOURCE_CREATION_DTM, 
WICG.IGNORE_ORDER_FLG, 
WICG.SALES_ORDER_GROUP_CD, 
WICG.ITEM_CLASSIFIED_FLG, 
WICG.REASON_CMNT, 
WICG.REMOVED_DT, 
WICG.BK_SHIPSET_NUM_INT, 
WICG.BK_SRC_LOC_ISO_COUNTRY_CD, 
WICG.BK_SHIP_TO_ISO_COUNTRY_CD, 
WICG.BK_SRCLOC_OVERRIDE_ISOCNTRY_CD, 
WICG.BK_SHP_TO_OVERRIDE_ISOCNTRY_CD, 
WICG.BK_SHP_TO_OVERRIDE_WRLD_CG_CD, 
WICG.BK_SRC_LOC_OVERRIDE_WRLD_CG_CD, 
WICG.BK_OCC_INTERFACE_ISO_CNTRY_CD, 
WICG.BK_OCC_INTERFACE_OVRDE_CG_CD, 
SCIE.SK_NOTIFY_SEQ_INT, 
SCIE.SS_CD, 
WICG.RU_SHIPMENT_DT, 
WICG.RU_LAST_UPDATED_DT, 
WICG.RU_SCHEDULED_ARRIVAL_DT, 
WICG.RU_ORDER_STATUS_CD, 
WICG.RU_ROUTE_CD, 
WICG.RU_IMPORT_STATUS_FLG, 
WICG.RU_ORDER_HOLD_FLG, 
WICG.RU_IMPORTER_OF_RECORD_NAME, 
WICG.RU_MISSING_SHIP_FROM_HTS_FLG, 
WICG.RU_CG1_BUSINESS_GROUP_CD, 
WICG.RU_BK_SHPFRM_OVRDE_WRLD_CG_CD, 
WICG.RU_BK_SHPFRM_OVRDE_ISOCNTRY_CD, 
WICG.RU_BK_SHIP_FROM_ISO_COUNTRY_CD, 
WICG.RU_BK_INTRFC_OVRDE_ISOCNTRY_CD, 
WICG.PRODUCT_KEY, 
WICG.CG1_TYPE, 
WICG.RU_SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
WICG.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
WICG.RU_SRC_RPTD_SO_NUM, 
WICG.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
WICG.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
WICG.EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
WICG.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
WICG.MISSING_OCC_CG_HTS_FLG, 
WICG.RU_SRC_RPTD_SHIPSET_NUM_INT,
WICG.ACTION_CODE,
WICG.DML_TYPE
FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_CUBE_ITEM_EXCEPTION_CG WICG
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_CUBE_ITEM_EXCEPTION SCIE
 ON (WICG.SK_NOTIFY_SEQ_INT=SCIE.SK_NOTIFY_SEQ_INT
 AND WICG.SS_CD=SCIE.SS_CD))B

SELECT
COALESCE(ST.REC_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS RECORD_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(ST.MISSING_PART_FLG,'=') AS  MISSING_PRODUCT_FLG ,
COALESCE(ST.MISSING_SHIP_TO_HTS_FLG,'=') AS MISSING_SHIP_TO_HTS_FLG,
COALESCE(ST.MISSING_SLC_HTS_FLG,'=') AS MSNG_SRC_LOC_OVERRIDE_HTS_FLG,
COALESCE(ST.IMPORTED_FLAG,'=') AS IMPORTED_ITEM_FLG,
COALESCE (ST.CREATION_DATE  , CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS SRC_CREATION_DTM,
COALESCE(ST.IGNORE_FLAG,'=') AS IGNORE_ORDER_FLG ,
COALESCE(ST.ORDER_GROUP,'UNKNOWN') AS SALES_ORDER_GROUP_CD,
COALESCE(ST.CLASSIFIED_FLAG,'=') AS ITEM_CLASSIFIED_FLG,
ST.REASON AS REASON_CMNT,
 COALESCE(CAST (ST.REMOVED_DATE AS DATE), DATE '3500-01-01')  AS REMOVED_DT,
-999 AS BK_SHIPSET_NUM_INT ,
COALESCE(NIC1.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK') AS BK_SRC_LOC_ISO_COUNTRY_CD ,
COALESCE(NIC2.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK') AS BK_SHIP_TO_ISO_COUNTRY_CD ,
COALESCE(NIC3.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK') AS BK_SRCLOC_OVERRIDE_ISOCNTRY_CD,
COALESCE(NIC4.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK') AS BK_SHP_TO_OVERRIDE_ISOCNTRY_CD,
COALESCE(NWCG1.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD,'UNK') AS BK_SHP_TO_OVERRIDE_WRLD_CG_CD,
COALESCE(NWCG2.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD,'UNK') AS BK_SRC_LOC_OVERRIDE_WRLD_CG_CD,
COALESCE(NIC5.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK') AS BK_OCC_INTERFACE_ISO_CNTRY_CD,
COALESCE(NWCG3.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD,'UNK') AS BK_OCC_INTERFACE_OVRDE_CG_CD,
ST.NOTIFY_SEQ AS SK_NOTIFY_SEQ_INT,
'CB_ITM' AS SS_CD,
CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE) AS RU_SHIPMENT_DT,
CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE) AS RU_LAST_UPDATED_DT,
CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE) AS RU_SCHEDULED_ARRIVAL_DT,
'UNKNOWN' AS RU_ORDER_STATUS_CD,
'UNKNOWN' AS RU_ROUTE_CD,
'=' AS RU_IMPORT_STATUS_FLG,
'=' AS RU_ORDER_HOLD_FLG,
'UNKNOWN' AS RU_IMPORTER_OF_RECORD_NAME,
'=' AS RU_MISSING_SHIP_FROM_HTS_FLG,
'UNKNOWN' AS RU_CG1_BUSINESS_GROUP_CD,
'UNK' AS RU_BK_SHPFRM_OVRDE_WRLD_CG_CD,
'UNK' AS RU_BK_SHPFRM_OVRDE_ISOCNTRY_CD,
'UNK' AS RU_BK_SHIP_FROM_ISO_COUNTRY_CD,
'UNK' AS RU_BK_INTRFC_OVRDE_ISOCNTRY_CD,
COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-999) AS PRODUCT_KEY,
'CB' AS CG1_TYPE,
-999 AS RU_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
-999 AS RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
COALESCE (ST.ORDER_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') AS RU_SRC_RPTD_SO_NUM,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
COALESCE(ST.MISSING_OCC_HTS_FLG,'=') AS MISSING_OCC_CG_HTS_FLG,
COALESCE(CAST(ST.SHIPSET AS INTEGER),-999) AS RU_SRC_RPTD_SHIPSET_NUM_INT,
ST.ACTION_CODE AS ACTION_CODE,
'I' AS DML_TYPE

FROM
$$STGDB.ST_XXCFI_CB_ITEM_EXCEPTIONS ST
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP 
ON ST.ITEM_NAME=NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC1
 ON ST.SLC_CTRY=NIC1.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC2
 ON ST.SHIP_TO_CTRY=NIC2.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC3
 ON ST.SLC_OVR_CTRY=NIC3.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC4
 ON ST.SHIP_TO_OVR_CTRY=NIC4.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP NWCG1
 ON ST.SHIP_TO_OVR_CTY_GRP=NWCG1.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP NWCG2
 ON ST.SLC_OVR_CTY_GRP=NWCG2.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC5
 ON ST.OCC_CTRY=NIC5.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP NWCG3
 ON ST.OCC_OVR_CTY_GRP=NWCG3.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD
 UNION
 SELECT
COALESCE(EX.REC_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS RECORD_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(EX.MISSING_PART_FLG,'=') AS  MISSING_PRODUCT_FLG ,
COALESCE(EX.MISSING_SHIP_TO_HTS_FLG,'=') AS MISSING_SHIP_TO_HTS_FLG,
COALESCE(EX.MISSING_SLC_HTS_FLG,'=') AS MSNG_SRC_LOC_OVERRIDE_HTS_FLG,
COALESCE(EX.IMPORTED_FLAG,'=') AS IMPORTED_ITEM_FLG,
 COALESCE(EX.CREATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS SRC_CREATION_DTM,
COALESCE(EX.IGNORE_FLAG,'=') AS IGNORE_ORDER_FLG ,
COALESCE(EX.ORDER_GROUP,'UNKNOWN') AS SALES_ORDER_GROUP_CD,
COALESCE(EX.CLASSIFIED_FLAG,'=') AS ITEM_CLASSIFIED_FLG,
EX.REASON AS REASON_CMNT,
 COALESCE(CAST (EX.REMOVED_DATE AS DATE), DATE '3500-01-01')   AS REMOVED_DT,
-999 AS BK_SHIPSET_NUM_INT ,
COALESCE(NIC1.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_SRC_LOC_ISO_COUNTRY_CD ,
COALESCE(NIC2.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_SHIP_TO_ISO_COUNTRY_CD ,
COALESCE(NIC3.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_SRCLOC_OVERRIDE_ISOCNTRY_CD,
COALESCE(NIC4.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_SHP_TO_OVERRIDE_ISOCNTRY_CD,
COALESCE(NWCG1.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD,'UNK') AS BK_SHP_TO_OVERRIDE_WRLD_CG_CD,
COALESCE(NWCG2.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD,'UNK') AS BK_SRC_LOC_OVERRIDE_WRLD_CG_CD,
COALESCE(NIC5.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_OCC_INTERFACE_ISO_CNTRY_CD,
COALESCE(NWCG3.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD,'UNK') AS BK_OCC_INTERFACE_OVRDE_CG_CD,
EX.NOTIFY_SEQ AS SK_NOTIFY_SEQ_INT,
'CB_ITM' AS SS_CD,
CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE) AS RU_SHIPMENT_DT,
CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE) AS RU_LAST_UPDATED_DT,
CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE) AS RU_SCHEDULED_ARRIVAL_DT,
'UNKNOWN' AS RU_ORDER_STATUS_CD,
'UNKNOWN' AS RU_ROUTE_CD,
'=' AS RU_IMPORT_STATUS_FLG,
'=' AS RU_ORDER_HOLD_FLG,
'UNKNOWN' AS RU_IMPORTER_OF_RECORD_NAME,
'=' AS RU_MISSING_SHIP_FROM_HTS_FLG,
'UNKNOWN' AS RU_CG1_BUSINESS_GROUP_CD,
'UNK' AS RU_BK_SHPFRM_OVRDE_WRLD_CG_CD,
'UNK' AS RU_BK_SHPFRM_OVRDE_ISOCNTRY_CD,
'UNK' AS RU_BK_SHIP_FROM_ISO_COUNTRY_CD,
'UNK' AS RU_BK_INTRFC_OVRDE_ISOCNTRY_CD,
COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-999) AS PRODUCT_KEY,
'CB' AS CG1_TYPE,
-999 AS RU_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
-999 AS RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
COALESCE (EX.ORDER_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') AS RU_SRC_RPTD_SO_NUM,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
COALESCE(EX.MISSING_OCC_HTS_FLG,'=') AS MISSING_OCC_CG_HTS_FLG,
COALESCE(CAST (EX.SHIPSET AS INTEGER),-999) AS RU_SRC_RPTD_SHIPSET_NUM_INT,
EX.ACTION_CODE AS ACTION_CODE,
'I' AS DML_TYPE
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_XXCFI_CB_ITEM_EXCEPTIONS EX
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP 
ON EX.ITEM_NAME=NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC1
 ON EX.SLC_CTRY=NIC1.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC2
 ON EX.SHIP_TO_CTRY=NIC2.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC3
 ON EX.SLC_OVR_CTRY=NIC3.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC4
 ON EX.SHIP_TO_OVR_CTRY=NIC4.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP NWCG1
 ON EX.SHIP_TO_OVR_CTY_GRP=NWCG1.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP NWCG2
 ON EX.SLC_OVR_CTY_GRP=NWCG2.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC5
 ON EX.OCC_CTRY=NIC5.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP NWCG3
 ON EX.OCC_OVR_CTY_GRP=NWCG3.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD

SELECT 
ST.NOTIFY_SEQ, 
ST.ORDNO, 
ST.ORDER_NUMBER, 
ST.ORDER_GROUP, 
ST.ITEM_NAME, 
ST.REC_TYPE, 
ST.SLC_CTRY, 
ST.SHIP_TO_CTRY, 
ST.SLC_OVR_CTRY, 
ST.SHIP_TO_OVR_CTRY, 
ST.SHIPSET, 
ST.MISSING_PART_FLG, 
ST.MISSING_SLC_HTS_FLG, 
ST.MISSING_SHIP_TO_HTS_FLG, 
ST.CREATION_DATE, 
ST.IMPORTED_FLAG, 
ST.CLASSIFIED_FLAG, 
ST.IGNORE_FLAG, 
ST.WORK_BENCH_ID, 
ST.SHIP_TO_OVR_CTY_GRP, 
ST.SLC_OVR_CTY_GRP, 
ST.CREATED_BY, 
ST.FCD_DATE, 
ST.OCC_CTRY, 
ST.OCC_OVR_CTY_GRP, 
ST.MISSING_OCC_HTS_FLG, 
ST.SUPERBOM, 
ST.SHIP_DATE, 
ST.ROUTE_CODE, 
ST.LINE_ID, 
ST.STATUS, 
ST.ORDER_HOLD, 
ST.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, 
ST.ITEM_TYPE, 
ST.ITEM_DESCRIPTION, 
ST.SCHEDULE_SHIP_DATE, 
ST.SCHEDULE_ARRIVAL_DATE, 
ST.BUSINESS_GROUP, 
ST.IOR, 
ST.OCC_OVR_CTRY, 
ST.SHIP_FROM_OVR_CTY_GRP, 
ST.SHIP_FROM_OVR_CTRY, 
ST.SHIP_FROM_CTRY, 
ST.LAST_UPDATED_DATE, 
ST.IMPORT_STATUS, 
ST.ATTRIBUTE1, 
ST.ATTRIBUTE2, 
ST.ATTRIBUTE3, 
ST.WORKBENCH_FLAG, 
ST.REASON, 
ST.REMOVED_DATE, 
ST.CREATE_DATETIME, 
ST.ACTION_CODE 
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_XXCFI_CB_CG1_ITM_EXCEPTIONS ST 
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SEL 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NPDT 
INNER JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC
 ON ST.SLC_CTRY=NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
INNER JOIN    $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC1
 ON ST.SHIP_TO_CTRY=NIC1.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
INNER JOIN    $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC2
 ON ST.SLC_OVR_CTRY=NIC2.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
INNER JOIN    $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC3
 ON ST.SHIP_TO_OVR_CTRY=NIC3.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
INNER JOIN    $$FINLGLVWDB.N_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP NWCG
 ON ST.SHIP_TO_OVR_CTY_GRP=NWCG.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD
INNER JOIN    $$FINLGLVWDB.N_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP NWCG1
 ON ST.SLC_OVR_CTY_GRP=NWCG1.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD 
 INNER JOIN    $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC4
 ON ST.OCC_CTRY=NIC4.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
INNER JOIN    $$FINLGLVWDB.N_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP NWCG2
 ON ST.OCC_OVR_CTY_GRP=NWCG2.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD
 INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP NWCG3
 ON ST.SHIP_FROM_OVR_CTY_GRP=NWCG3.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD
 INNER JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC5
 ON ST.SHIP_FROM_OVR_CTRY=NIC5.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
 INNER JOIN    $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC6
 ON ST.SHIP_FROM_CTRY=NIC6.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
 INNER JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC7
 ON ST.OCC_OVR_CTRY=NIC7.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
INNER JOIN (SEL * FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTL
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY ORDER_NUMBER  ORDER BY LINE_SEQ_ID )=1) EL
ON ST.ORDER_NUMBER=EL.ORDER_NUMBER
INNER JOIN    $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER  NSO
ON EL.ORDER_NUMBER=NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
AND NSO.SS_CODE='CG'
INNER JOIN (SEL * FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTL
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY ORDER_NUMBER  ORDER BY LINE_SEQ_ID )=1) EL1
ON ST.ORDER_NUMBER=EL1.ORDER_NUMBER
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER  NSO1
ON EL1.ORDER_NUMBER=NSO1.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
AND EL1.SRC=NSO1.SS_CODE
INNER JOIN   $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON ST.LINE_ID =NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
AND EL.SRC=NSOL.SS_CODE
INNER JOIN    $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SHIPSET NS
ON NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NS.SALES_ORDER_KEY
AND ST.SHIPSET=NS.BK_SHIP_SET_NUM_INT
WHERE  ST.ITEM_NAME=NPDT.BK_PRODUCT_ID)

SELECT 
COALESCE(ST.REC_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS RECORD_TYPE_CD          ,      
COALESCE(ST.MISSING_PART_FLG,'=') AS MISSING_PRODUCT_FLG       ,    
COALESCE(ST.MISSING_SHIP_TO_HTS_FLG,'=')  AS MISSING_SHIP_TO_HTS_FLG    ,   
COALESCE(ST.MISSING_SLC_HTS_FLG,'=')  AS MSNG_SRC_LOC_OVERRIDE_HTS_FLG ,
COALESCE(ST.IMPORTED_FLAG,'=')  AS IMPORTED_ITEM_FLG,             
COALESCE (ST.CREATION_DATE  , CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS SRC_CREATION_DTM     ,      
COALESCE(ST.IGNORE_FLAG,'=')  AS IGNORE_ORDER_FLG   ,           
COALESCE(ST.ORDER_GROUP,'UNKNOWN') AS SALES_ORDER_GROUP_CD          ,
COALESCE(ST.CLASSIFIED_FLAG,'=')  AS ITEM_CLASSIFIED_FLG    ,       
ST.REASON AS REASON_CMNT    ,               
 COALESCE(CAST (ST.REMOVED_DATE AS DATE), DATE '3500-01-01')  AS REMOVED_DT    ,                
COALESCE (NS.BK_SHIP_SET_NUM_INT,-999) AS BK_SHIPSET_NUM_INT            ,
COALESCE(NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE ,'UNK') AS BK_SRC_LOC_ISO_COUNTRY_CD     ,
COALESCE(NIC1.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK') AS BK_SHIP_TO_ISO_COUNTRY_CD     ,
COALESCE(NIC2.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK') AS BK_SRCLOC_OVERRIDE_ISOCNTRY_CD,
COALESCE(NIC3.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK') AS BK_SHP_TO_OVERRIDE_ISOCNTRY_CD,
COALESCE(NWCG.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD ,'UNK') AS BK_SHP_TO_OVERRIDE_WRLD_CG_CD ,
COALESCE(NWCG1.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD ,'UNK') AS BK_SRC_LOC_OVERRIDE_WRLD_CG_CD,
COALESCE(NIC4.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK') AS BK_OCC_INTERFACE_ISO_CNTRY_CD ,
COALESCE(NWCG2.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD ,'UNK') AS BK_OCC_INTERFACE_OVRDE_CG_CD  ,
ST.NOTIFY_SEQ AS SK_NOTIFY_SEQ_INT    ,         
'CG1_ITM' AS SS_CD,                         
ST.SHIP_DATE AS RU_SHIPMENT_DT           ,     
ST.LAST_UPDATED_DATE AS RU_LAST_UPDATED_DT       ,     
ST.SCHEDULE_ARRIVAL_DATE AS RU_SCHEDULED_ARRIVAL_DT,       
ST.STATUS AS  RU_ORDER_STATUS_CD    ,        
ST.ROUTE_CODE AS RU_ROUTE_CD     ,              
ST.IMPORT_STATUS AS RU_IMPORT_STATUS_FLG ,         
ST.ORDER_HOLD AS RU_ORDER_HOLD_FLG,             
ST.IOR AS RU_IMPORTER_OF_RECORD_NAME  ,  
ST.ATTRIBUTE1 AS RU_MISSING_SHIP_FROM_HTS_FLG  ,
ST.BUSINESS_GROUP AS RU_CG1_BUSINESS_GROUP_CD      ,
COALESCE(NWCG3.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD ,'UNK') AS RU_BK_SHPFRM_OVRDE_WRLD_CG_CD, 
COALESCE(NIC5.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE ,'UNK') AS RU_BK_SHPFRM_OVRDE_ISOCNTRY_CD,
COALESCE(NIC6.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE,'UNK')  AS RU_BK_SHIP_FROM_ISO_COUNTRY_CD,
COALESCE(NIC7.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE,'UNK')  AS RU_BK_INTRFC_OVRDE_ISOCNTRY_CD,
COALESCE(NPDT.ITEM_KEY,-9999)  AS PRODUCT_KEY  ,                 
'CG1' AS CG1_TYPE               ,       
COALESCE(NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY,NSO1.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-999) AS RU_SALES_ORDER_KEY   ,         
COALESCE(NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-999) AS RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   ,    
COALESCE (ST.ORDER_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') AS RU_SRC_RPTD_SO_NUM     ,       
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM    ,            
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,                
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
COALESCE(ST.MISSING_OCC_HTS_FLG,'=') AS MISSING_OCC_CG_HTS_FLG,
COALESCE(CAST (ST.SHIPSET AS INTEGER),-999) AS RU_SRC_RPTD_SHIPSET_NUM_INT,
ST.ACTION_CODE AS ACTION_CODE,
'I' AS DML_TYPE      
FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXCFI_CB_CG1_ITM_EXCEPTIONS ST  
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NPDT 
ON ST.ITEM_NAME=NPDT.BK_PRODUCT_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC
 ON ST.SLC_CTRY=NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC1
 ON ST.SHIP_TO_CTRY=NIC1.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC2
 ON ST.SLC_OVR_CTRY=NIC2.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC3
 ON ST.SHIP_TO_OVR_CTRY=NIC3.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP NWCG
 ON ST.SHIP_TO_OVR_CTY_GRP=NWCG.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP NWCG1
 ON ST.SLC_OVR_CTY_GRP=NWCG1.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC4
 ON ST.OCC_CTRY=NIC4.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP NWCG2
 ON ST.OCC_OVR_CTY_GRP=NWCG2.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP NWCG3
 ON ST.SHIP_FROM_OVR_CTY_GRP=NWCG3.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC5
 ON ST.SHIP_FROM_OVR_CTRY=NIC5.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC6
 ON ST.SHIP_FROM_CTRY=NIC6.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC7
 ON ST.OCC_OVR_CTRY=NIC7.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
 LEFT OUTER JOIN (SEL * FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTL
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY ORDER_NUMBER  ORDER BY LINE_SEQ_ID )=1) EL
ON ST.ORDER_NUMBER=EL.ORDER_NUMBER
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER  NSO
ON EL.ORDER_NUMBER=NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
AND NSO.SS_CODE='CG'
 LEFT OUTER JOIN (SEL * FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTL
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY ORDER_NUMBER  ORDER BY LINE_SEQ_ID )=1) EL1
ON ST.ORDER_NUMBER=EL1.ORDER_NUMBER
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER  NSO1
ON EL1.ORDER_NUMBER=NSO1.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
AND EL1.SRC=NSO1.SS_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON ST.LINE_ID =NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
AND EL.SRC=NSOL.SS_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SHIPSET NS
ON NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NS.SALES_ORDER_KEY
AND ST.SHIPSET=NS.BK_SHIP_SET_NUM_INT

 
 UNION ALL 
 
 SELECT
COALESCE(EX.REC_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS RECORD_TYPE_CD          ,      
COALESCE(EX.MISSING_PART_FLG,'=') AS MISSING_PRODUCT_FLG       ,    
COALESCE(EX.MISSING_SHIP_TO_HTS_FLG,'=')  AS MISSING_SHIP_TO_HTS_FLG    ,   
COALESCE(EX.MISSING_SLC_HTS_FLG,'=')  AS MSNG_SRC_LOC_OVERRIDE_HTS_FLG ,
COALESCE(EX.IMPORTED_FLAG,'=')  AS IMPORTED_ITEM_FLG,             
COALESCE (EX.CREATION_DATE , TIMESTAMP '3500-01-01 00:00:00') AS SRC_CREATION_DTM     ,      
COALESCE(EX.IGNORE_FLAG,'=')  AS IGNORE_ORDER_FLG   ,           
COALESCE(EX.ORDER_GROUP,'UNKNOWN') AS SALES_ORDER_GROUP_CD          ,
COALESCE(EX.CLASSIFIED_FLAG,'=')  AS ITEM_CLASSIFIED_FLG    ,          
EX.REASON AS REASON_CMNT    ,               
 COALESCE(CAST (EX.REMOVED_DATE AS DATE), DATE '3500-01-01') AS REMOVED_DT    ,                
COALESCE (NS.BK_SHIP_SET_NUM_INT,-999) AS BK_SHIPSET_NUM_INT            ,
COALESCE(NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK') AS BK_SRC_LOC_ISO_COUNTRY_CD     ,
COALESCE(NIC1.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK') AS BK_SHIP_TO_ISO_COUNTRY_CD     ,
COALESCE(NIC2.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK') AS BK_SRCLOC_OVERRIDE_ISOCNTRY_CD,
COALESCE(NIC3.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK') AS BK_SHP_TO_OVERRIDE_ISOCNTRY_CD,
COALESCE(NWCG.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD,'UNK') AS BK_SHP_TO_OVERRIDE_WRLD_CG_CD ,
COALESCE(NWCG1.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD,'UNK') AS BK_SRC_LOC_OVERRIDE_WRLD_CG_CD,
COALESCE(NIC4.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK') AS BK_OCC_INTERFACE_ISO_CNTRY_CD ,
COALESCE(NWCG2.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD,'UNK') AS BK_OCC_INTERFACE_OVRDE_CG_CD  ,
EX.NOTIFY_SEQ AS SK_NOTIFY_SEQ_INT    ,         
'CG1_ITM' AS SS_CD,                         
EX.SHIP_DATE AS RU_SHIPMENT_DT           ,     
EX.LAST_UPDATED_DATE AS RU_LAST_UPDATED_DT       ,     
EX.SCHEDULE_ARRIVAL_DATE AS RU_SCHEDULED_ARRIVAL_DT,       
EX.STATUS AS  RU_ORDER_STATUS_CD    ,        
EX.ROUTE_CODE AS RU_ROUTE_CD     ,              
EX.IMPORT_STATUS AS RU_IMPORT_STATUS_FLG ,         
EX.ORDER_HOLD AS RU_ORDER_HOLD_FLG,             
EX.IOR AS RU_IMPORTER_OF_RECORD_NAME  ,  
EX.ATTRIBUTE1 AS RU_MISSING_SHIP_FROM_HTS_FLG  ,
EX.BUSINESS_GROUP AS RU_CG1_BUSINESS_GROUP_CD      ,
COALESCE(NWCG3.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD,'UNK') AS RU_BK_SHPFRM_OVRDE_WRLD_CG_CD, 
COALESCE(NIC5.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE,'UNK') AS RU_BK_SHPFRM_OVRDE_ISOCNTRY_CD,
COALESCE(NIC6.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE,'UNK') AS RU_BK_SHIP_FROM_ISO_COUNTRY_CD,
COALESCE(NIC7.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE,'UNK') AS RU_BK_INTRFC_OVRDE_ISOCNTRY_CD,
COALESCE(NPDT.ITEM_KEY,-9999) AS PRODUCT_KEY  ,                 
'CG1' AS CG1_TYPE               ,       
COALESCE(NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY,NSO1.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-999) AS  RU_SALES_ORDER_KEY   ,         
COALESCE(NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-999) AS  RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   ,    
COALESCE (EX.ORDER_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') AS RU_SRC_RPTD_SO_NUM     ,       
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM    ,            
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,                
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
COALESCE(EX.MISSING_OCC_HTS_FLG,'=') AS MISSING_OCC_CG_HTS_FLG,
COALESCE(CAST (EX.SHIPSET AS INTEGER),999) AS RU_SRC_RPTD_SHIPSET_NUM_INT,
EX.ACTION_CODE AS ACTION_CODE,
'I' AS DML_TYPE      
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_XXCFI_CB_CG1_ITM_EXCEPTNS EX  
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NPDT ON EX.ITEM_NAME=NPDT.BK_PRODUCT_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC
 ON EX.SLC_CTRY=NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC1
 ON EX.SHIP_TO_CTRY=NIC1.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC2
 ON EX.SLC_OVR_CTRY=NIC2.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC3
 ON EX.SHIP_TO_OVR_CTRY=NIC3.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP NWCG
 ON EX.SHIP_TO_OVR_CTY_GRP=NWCG.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP NWCG1
 ON EX.SLC_OVR_CTY_GRP=NWCG1.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC4
 ON EX.OCC_CTRY=NIC4.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP NWCG2
 ON EX.OCC_OVR_CTY_GRP=NWCG2.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP NWCG3
 ON EX.SHIP_FROM_OVR_CTY_GRP=NWCG3.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC5
 ON EX.SHIP_FROM_OVR_CTRY=NIC5.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC6
 ON EX.SHIP_FROM_CTRY=NIC6.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC7
 ON EX.OCC_OVR_CTRY=NIC7.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
 LEFT OUTER JOIN (SEL * FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTL
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY ORDER_NUMBER  ORDER BY LINE_SEQ_ID )=1) EL
ON EX.ORDER_NUMBER=EL.ORDER_NUMBER
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER  NSO
ON EL.ORDER_NUMBER=NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
AND NSO.SS_CODE='CG'
 LEFT OUTER JOIN (SEL * FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTL
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY ORDER_NUMBER  ORDER BY LINE_SEQ_ID )=1) EL1
ON EX.ORDER_NUMBER=EL1.ORDER_NUMBER
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER  NSO1
ON EL1.ORDER_NUMBER=NSO1.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
AND EL1.SRC=NSO1.SS_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON EX.LINE_ID =NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
AND EL.SRC=NSOL.SS_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SHIPSET NS
ON NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NS.SALES_ORDER_KEY
AND EX.SHIPSET=NS.BK_SHIP_SET_NUM_INT

SELECT 
	(RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SXRI.SK_NOTIFY_SEQ_INT,SXRI.SS_CD) + SM.MAX_KEY) AS CUBE_ITEM_EXCEPTION_KEY,
	SXRI.SK_NOTIFY_SEQ_INT,
	SXRI.SS_CD,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
	USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
FROM 
	(
		SELECT 
			WIC.SK_NOTIFY_SEQ_INT AS SK_NOTIFY_SEQ_INT,
			WIC.SS_CD AS SS_CD
		FROM $$STGDB.WI_CUBE_ITEM_EXCEPTION WIC
		UNION ALL
		SELECT 
			WICG.SK_NOTIFY_SEQ_INT AS SK_NOTIFY_SEQ_INT,
			WICG.SS_CD  AS SS_CD
		FROM $$STGDB.WI_CUBE_ITEM_EXCEPTION_CG WICG

	) SXRI,
	(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CUBE_ITEM_EXCEPTION_KEY),0) AS MAX_KEY
	 FROM     $$ETLVWDB.SM_CUBE_ITEM_EXCEPTION) SM
	WHERE 1=1
AND NOT EXISTS
	 ( SELECT 1
	   FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_CUBE_ITEM_EXCEPTION SM1
	   WHERE  SXRI.SK_NOTIFY_SEQ_INT = SM1.SK_NOTIFY_SEQ_INT
				AND  SXRI.SS_CD = SM1.SS_CD
	 )
